title: Pongelion grande
preparations: Pongelion grande is not a recognized plant species. However, I can provide information on a plant similar to what you might be asking about. The Pongamia pinnata, also known as Pongam tree, has been used in traditional medicine for centuries. Herbal preparations made from the Pongam tree include oils, extracts, and infusions used to treat various health issues. These preparations are believed to have antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties.
